purpose: AI-powered Sales by Number training simulator where Sleep Number sales professionals practice the 6-step SBN methodology against AI customer avatars, with behavior-based scoring, gamification, and manager coaching tools
features: Voice-and-avatar AI customer simulator with optional text chat
4 core customer personas (Director, Relater, Socializer, Thinker)
Randomized persona blends that unlock as salespeople level up
6-step SBN scoring: Connect & Discover, WOW & IndividualFit, Individualize the Sleep Experience, Address Concerns & Close Today, Educate & Excite, Grow the Relationship
Per-session behavior-based scoring on purpose, key behaviors, and must-dos
Full gamification: levels/progression, leaderboards, badges/achievements, streaks, weekly challenges
Salesperson dashboard: strengths, improvement areas, progress over time
Store Manager dashboard: team insights, performance analytics, assign practice scenarios
Regional Manager dashboard: cross-store analytics, regional performance trends
Manager ability to assign targeted practice scenarios to individual salespeople
Integration with external reporting systems for sales conversion correlation
AI prompt management system for non-technical prompt editing

step_1.name: Connect & Discover
step_1.purpose: Customer buys into you as a trusted consultant

step_2.name: WOW & IndividualFit
step_2.purpose: Customer buys into the benefits of Sleep Number smart beds

users.description: Sleep Number sales professionals, store managers, and regional managers
users.estimated_count: ~7,000 sales professionals across ~700 stores, plus managers

roles.description: View store team performance, assign scenarios, coaching tools
Cross-store analytics, regional trends, all store manager capabilities
System configuration, prompt management, user management

stack.ai: Azure OpenAI (GPT for conversation, Speech Services for STT/TTS, Avatar generation)
stack.orm: asyncpg / raw SQL with parameterized queries

app_type: AI/ML application with real-time voice interaction

multi_tenancy.note: Single org (Sleep Number) but needs store/region organizational hierarchy

components: Conversational AI for customer persona simulation (GPT)
SBN behavior evaluation and scoring (AI judge)

gamification.persona_unlock: Randomized persona blends unlock as salesperson demonstrates proficiency with base 4

special_features: Real-time voice interaction with AI avatars

deployment.deployment_model: Docker containers on Azure Container Apps (NOT App Service/Functions like PulseApp)
deployment.infrastructure: Terraform for Azure resources only (ACA Environment, ACR, PostgreSQL, Key Vault, VNet). App deployment via Docker/ACA, not Terraform.
deployment.networking: Private VNet, zero public access (following PulseApp pattern)

pages: Dashboard (salesperson home: recent scores, streaks, next challenge, quick-start practice)
Pre-Session (persona selection, scenario filters, difficulty level)
Session (voice/avatar interaction, SBN step progress bar, sentiment gauge, transcript)
Feedback (per-session scoring, SBN step breakdown, coaching tips, behavior analysis)
Progress (personal history, trends, achievements, badges, leaderboard position)
Manager Dashboard (team overview, individual drilldown, assign scenarios)
Regional Dashboard (cross-store analytics, regional trends, top performers)
Scenario Manager (create/assign practice scenarios and challenges)
Admin Panel (prompt management, system config, user management)
